title: arachnorchis uliginosa subsp. patulens
intro: Arachnorchis uliginosa subsp. patulens is a rare, terrestrial orchid native to Western Australia, characterized by its small, delicate flowers and slender leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Arachnorchis uliginosa subsp. patulens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valued component in traditional Aboriginal medicine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
